headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Jacobs (J) Winning Major California Highway Management Contracts
summary: Jacobs announced it has been selected by the Orange County Transportation Authority to provide construction management services for two major highway improvement projects in California’s SR-91 and I-5 corridors, aimed at easing congestion, improving safety and modernizing key infrastructure. This win underlines Jacobs’ role in large-scale transportation upgrades that can reinforce its infrastructure portfolio and deepen relationships with public-sector clients. We’ll now examine how securing...
